description: Spec for the next primary yoyo eval suite. These are not synthetic punctures; they are daily-engineering task templates that should be instantiated from real repositories and natural prompts.

tasks.title: Integration test failure with non-local root cause
tasks.prompt_shape: Start from a failing integration test or stack trace. The correct fix requires tracing from the failing surface to a helper or abstraction in another file.
why_yoyo_should_help: impact for related callers before editing
tasks.daily_engineering_fit: Typical production bugfix with misleading local symptoms.

tasks.title: Add a config option that propagates through the stack
tasks.prompt_shape: Implement a small new option or flag that must move through parsing, model wiring, runtime behavior, and tests.
why_yoyo_should_help: map to orient in an unfamiliar repo
impact to find affected downstream code
tasks.daily_engineering_fit: Common product work in services, CLIs, and libraries.

tasks.title: Safe API rename across a real codebase
tasks.prompt_shape: Rename a shared symbol or method used across multiple files without changing behavior.
why_yoyo_should_help: change for safe rename or coordinated edits

tasks.title: Signature change on a widely used helper
tasks.prompt_shape: Add or remove a parameter on a shared helper, then migrate the correct callers and tests.
why_yoyo_should_help: impact to find dependent call chains
inspect for exact signature and receiver details

tasks.title: HTTP behavior change across router, validation, and response layer
tasks.prompt_shape: Implement or fix request behavior that spans route registration, input validation, business logic, and response formatting.
why_yoyo_should_help: change to update the minimal end-to-end path
tasks.daily_engineering_fit: Common backend feature and bugfix work.

tasks.title: Trait or interface contract mismatch
tasks.prompt_shape: A behavior bug appears in one module, but the real issue is an implementation mismatch behind a trait or interface boundary.
tasks.daily_engineering_fit: Frequent in layered or modular codebases.

tasks.title: What breaks if we change this symbol?
tasks.prompt_shape: No code change at first. The job is to produce an accurate blast-radius analysis for a proposed change.
why_yoyo_should_help: health to detect dead or risky dependents
tasks.daily_engineering_fit: Very common before refactors or deprecations.

tasks.title: Can this code be safely removed?
tasks.prompt_shape: Determine whether a symbol, route, or helper is truly unused or still connected through a non-obvious path.
why_yoyo_should_help: change only if the delete is justified
tasks.daily_engineering_fit: Maintenance work with real regression risk.

tasks.title: Behavior changed intentionally; repair the right side
tasks.prompt_shape: A failing test no longer matches intended behavior. Determine whether to update the test, the implementation, or both.
why_yoyo_should_help: search for related assertions and callers
impact to avoid narrow local fixes
tasks.daily_engineering_fit: Routine after feature work and refactors.

tasks.title: Small feature in a large repo with ambiguous placement
tasks.prompt_shape: Add a narrow feature or option in a large codebase where placement is not obvious from file names alone.
why_yoyo_should_help: boot and map to orient quickly
ask and search to find the right implementation area
impact and change to land a minimal patch
tasks.daily_engineering_fit: Representative of work in mature OSS repos.
